working_on: Investigate structural-phase regression — third fire of validator_runtime_phase_regression (ADR 0063 readiness note T1-A/T1-B closure).
declared_scope: Profile the 10 structural-phase sub-checks against the live repo (n=5 warm iterations each via /tmp throwaway harness, S-0151 model); diagnose the dominant contributor(s) since S-0151's 491ms baseline; apply ADR 0084 doubt-driven extraction pass on the chosen disposition path (A optimize hot check / B phase boundary correction / C target adjustment with evidence); land the chosen fix; verify with back-to-back validate runs and pytest. If Path C is chosen, fold ADR 0063 Consequences + update tools-validate-interpretation.md + health-check.md tiered-target prose + readiness-note T1-C closure. phase: NA-engine-validator-perf
outcome_summary: Third lifetime fire of validator_runtime_phase_regression closed via Path A (timestamp_helper_bypass keyword pre-filter — 5.3x speedup; commit 78b439e) + Path C (structural target 500→700ms with ADR 0036 fold across ADR 0063 + ops docs + readiness note; commit 7ab46b8). Doubt-driven workflow application 5 paired (ADR 0084; commit 0c2e16b); premise 7 pre-authorized Path C fallback that materialized. Profile harnesses (S-0151 model, n=5 warm) attributed structural-phase cost to validate_repo_structure 1100ms (75%; validate_adr_back_reference_orphan 629ms intrinsic I/O, S-0151 inverted-index at algorithmic ceiling) + validate_timestamp_helper_bypass 331ms (23%; 25x regression since S-0151). Verification: 5/5 runs under new 1050ms threshold, median 570ms. Side-mid-session: killed eloquent-taussig stuck PID per user pushback against design-around. Cold-review pass (Python): 3 file(s), all match contract (one minor 'indirect test coverage' nit, acceptable). engine_memory: 2 drawers (pushback 075289bd, lesson 55671db1) + diary 0c181dd4.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — declared scope was 'profile, diagnose, doubt-driven pass, land chosen fix, verify'; all delivered. Path C (target adjustment) was applied in addition to Path A, but this was pre-authorized by the doubt-driven workflow application 5's RECONCILE on premise 7 (anticipated as the fallback if sustained breach reproduced post-Path-A; declared in the plan's 'If Path C is chosen' clause). ADR 0063 Consequences fold + ops docs (tools-validate-interpretation.md + health-check.md) + readiness-note T1-C closure all completed per the plan.

side_discoveries.reasoning: The Path A commit message named that Path C would land in a follow-up commit. Path C (target bump + ADR 0063 fold + ops docs + readiness note) landed as commit 7ab46b8 in this same session, immediately after Path A's commit. No deferral; addressed inline.
